use_cases: Display hierarchical file and folder structures in code editors or documentation
Navigate project directories in web-based IDEs or file managers
Organize and browse nested content in CMS or documentation platforms
Visualize directory trees in developer dashboard applications
Create expandable navigation menus for structured content
ai_summary: A hierarchical file tree component for displaying expandable folder and file structures with file-type-specific icons. Features click-to-expand folders, hover states, and smooth transitions. Built with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, optimized for developer tools and SaaS applications needing project navigation.
